  2. Community Sustainability
  3. Warming and Cooling Center Information

Warming and Cooling Center Information

Main Content

SPECIAL Independence Day Holiday Cooling Center Operating Hours Different from Normal Operating Hours

While the County's Department of Community Resources and Services' 50+ centers were originally slated to be CLOSED on Friday, July 3rd and 4th in observance of the Independence Day holiday, as noted in the "Howard County Government Closings on July 3rd and July 4th for Independence Day" news release online, the Bain 50+ Center, East Columbia 50+ Center, and Elkridge 50+ Center will now be OPEN on the 3rd and 4th from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. These centers will strictly be open for residents looking to take a seat in its front lobby area to access air conditioning and cool off.

Additionally, on the 4th, the North Laurel Community Center (NLCC) and Roger Carter Community Center (RCCC) were originally slated to close at 5:00 p.m. as noted in the aforementioned news release; however, these two facilities will now REMAIN OPEN on the 4th until 9:00 p.m. for residents looking to slip into the center's front lobby area to cool off in air conditioning. Please note, after 5:00 p.m. on the 4th, only the lobby area for the NLCC and RCCC will be open; the center's gyms and other amenities will be closed. The NLCC will open at its normal Saturday time, 8:00 a.m., and the RCCC at 7:00 a.m. on the 4th.

Finally, while the Gary J. Arthur Community Center (GJACC) was originally only open for planned programming on the 4th, as also noted in the aforementioned news release, the facility will NOW BE OPEN for its normal Saturday hours, 7:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. for residents strictly looking to stop by the center's front lobby to beat the heat. Please note, residents visiting GJACC to cool off and not for the scheduled planned programming, will not have access to the gym or any other the center's other amenities. 

Please note, all Howard County Library System branches are closed on the 3rd and 4th in observance of Independence Day holiday.

Get to Know the Locations of Warming and Cooling Centers Near You 

When an extreme cold or heat event is declared in Howard County, Howard County Government encourages community members in need of place to warm up or cool down to stop by one of our Department of Recreation & Parks' (DRP) three community centers, our Department of Community Resources and Services (DCRS) 50+ centers, or one of Howard County Library System (HCLS) branches during normal operating hours. Additionally, during these extreme temperature events, if you are or someone you encounter is in need of shelter from the cold or heat, please contact Grassroots Crisis Intervention's hotline at 410-531-6677 for assistance or go to its Crisis Center at 8990 Old Annapolis Road, Suite A in Columbia. 

To stay in the know about when there an extreme cold or heat event has been declared in Howard County, be sure to follow Howard County Government on its Facebook and X social media platforms for more information. 

You can also check on the status of: 

  • DCRS's facilities by calling the department's Emergency Status Hotline at 410-313-7777; 
  • DRP facilities by calling the department's "Inclement Weather and Program Status Lines" for each facility; and 
  • HCLS by calling the automated phone message at its local Howard County Library System branches.
Image

Department of Recreation & Parks' Community Centers 

  • 1 - Gary J. Arthur Community Center
    • Address: 2400 MD 97, Cooksville, MD 21723
    • Phone Number: 410-313-4840
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Saturday: 7:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m.
      • Sunday: 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m.
      • Closed: January 1st, Easter Sunday, Memorial Day, July 4th (open for planned programs only), Labor Day, Thanksgiving (Thursday and Friday), and December 25th
      • Closes Early at 5:00 p.m.: December 24th and 31st
  • 2 - North Laurel Community Center
    • Address: 9411 Whiskey Bottom Road, Laurel, MD 2023
    • Phone Numbers: 410-313-0390
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Saturday: 8:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m.
      • Sunday: 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m.
      • Closed: January 1st, Easter Sunday, Memorial Day, Labor Day, Thanksgiving (Thursday & Friday), and December 25th
      • Closes Early at 5:00 p.m.: July 4th and December 24th and 31st
  • 3 - Roger Carter Community Center
    • Address: 3000 Milltowne Drive, Ellicott City, MD 21043
    • Phone Number: 410-313-2764
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Friday: 6:00 a.m. to 10:00 p.m.
      • Saturday: 7:00 a.m. to 10:00 p.m.
      • Sunday: 7:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m.
      • Closed: January 1st, Easter Sunday, Thanksgiving (Thursday & Friday), and December 25th
      • Closes Early at 5:00 p.m.: Memorial Day, July 4th, Labor Day, and December 24th and 31st

Howard County Library System Branches

  • 4 - East Columbia Branch 
    • Address: 6600 Cradlerock Way, Columbia, MD 21045
    • Phone Number: 410-313-7700
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.
      • Friday and Saturday: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
      • Sunday (September 8th through June 1st): 1:00 to 5:00 p.m.
      • For scheduled closing information, visit HCLS's "Upcoming Closings" webpage
  • 5 - Elkridge Branch
    • Address: 6540 Washington Boulevard, Elkridge MD 21075
    • Phone Number: 410-313-5077
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.
      • Friday and Saturday: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
      • Sunday (September 8th through June 1st): 1:00 to 5:00 p.m.
      • For scheduled closing information, visit HCLS's "Upcoming Closings" webpage
  • 6 - Glenwood Branch
    • Address: 2350 MD 97, Cooksville, MD 21723
    • Phone Number: 410-313-5577
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.
      • Friday and Saturday: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
      • Sunday (September 8th through June 1st): 1:00 to 5:00 p.m.
      • For scheduled closing information, visit HCLS's "Upcoming Closings" webpage
  • 7 - Central Branch
    • Address: 10375 Little Patuxent Parkway, Columbia, MD 21044
    • Phone Number: 410-313-7800
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.
      • Friday and Saturday: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
      • Sunday: 1:00 to 5:00 p.m.
      • For scheduled closing information, visit HCLS's "Upcoming Closings" webpage
  • 8 - Charles E. Miller Branch
    • Address: 9421 Frederick Road, Ellicott City, MD 21042
    • Phone Number: 410-313-1950
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.
      • Friday and Saturday: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
      • Sunday: 1:00 to 5:00 p.m.
      • For scheduled closing information, visit HCLS's "Upcoming Closings" webpage
  • 9 - Savage Branch
    • Address: 9525 Durness Lane, Laurel, MD 20723
    • Phone Number: 410-313-0760
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.
      • Friday and Saturday: 9:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m.
      • Sunday (September 8th through June 1st): 1:00 to 5:00 p.m.
      • For scheduled closing information, visit HCLS's "Upcoming Closings" webpage

Department of Community Resources and Services 50+ Centers

  • 10 - Bain Center 50+ Center
    • Address: 5470 Ruth Keeton Way, Columbia, MD 21044
    • Phone Number: 410-313-7213
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 8:30 a.m. to 7:30 p.m.
      • Friday: 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.
      • Saturday: 8:30 a.m. to noon
      • Closed: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, President's Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth National Freedom Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Indigenous People's Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving Holiday (Thursday and Friday), and Christmas Day
        • Note: If a holiday falls on a Saturday, County offices, including 50+ centers are closed the day before, i.e., Friday, and if a holiday falls on a Sunday, the County will observe the holiday the following day, i.e., Monday
  • 11 - East Columbia 50+ Center
    • Address: 6610 Cradlerock Way, Columbia, MD 21045
    • Phone Number: 410-313-7680
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday and Wednesday: 8:30 a.m. to 7:30 p.m.
      • Tuesday and Thursday: 8:30 a.m. to 9:00 p.m.
      • Friday: 8:30 a.m. to 4:00 p.m.
      • Saturday: 8:30 a.m. to 12:00 p.m.
      • Closed: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, President's Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth National Freedom Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Indigenous People's Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving Holiday (Thursday and Friday), and Christmas Day
        • Note: If a holiday falls on a Saturday, County offices, including 50+ centers are closed the day before, i.e., Friday, and if a holiday falls on a Sunday, the County will observe the holiday the following day, i.e., Monday
  • 12 - Elkridge 50+ Center
    • Address: 6540 Washington Boulevard, Elkridge, MD 21075
    • Phone Number: 410-313-5192
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Thursday: 8:30 a.m. to 7:30 p.m.
      • Friday: 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.
      • Saturday: 8:30 a.m. to noon
      • Closed: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, President's Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth National Freedom Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Indigenous People's Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving Holiday (Thursday and Friday), and Christmas Day
        • Note: If a holiday falls on a Saturday, County offices, including 50+ centers are closed the day before, i.e., Friday, and if a holiday falls on a Sunday, the County will observe the holiday the following day, i.e., Monday
  • 13 - Ellicott City 50+ Center
    • Address: 9401 and 9411 Frederick Road Ellicott City, MD 21042
    • Phone Number: 410-313-1400
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Friday: 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.
      • Closed: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, President's Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth National Freedom Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Indigenous People's Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving Holiday (Thursday and Friday), and Christmas Day
        • Note: If a holiday falls on a Saturday, County offices, including 50+ centers are closed the day before, i.e., Friday, and if a holiday falls on a Sunday, the County will observe the holiday the following day, i.e., Monday
  • 14 - Glenwood 50+ Center
    • Address: 2400 Route 97 Cooksville, MD 21723
    • Phone Number: 410-313-5440
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday through Friday: 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.
      • Closed: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, President's Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth National Freedom Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Indigenous People's Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving Holiday (Thursday and Friday), and Christmas Day
        • Note: If a holiday falls on a Saturday, County offices, including 50+ centers are closed the day before, i.e., Friday, and if a holiday falls on a Sunday, the County will observe the holiday the following day, i.e., Monday
  • 15 - North Laurel 50+ Center
    • Address: 9411 Whiskey Bottom Road Laurel, MD 20723
    • Phone Number: 410-313-0380
    • Hours of Operation: 
      • Monday through Friday: 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.
      • Closed: New Year's Day, Martin Luther King, Jr. Day, President's Day, Good Friday, Memorial Day, Juneteenth National Freedom Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Indigenous People's Day, Veterans Day, Thanksgiving Holiday (Thursday and Friday), and Christmas Day
        • Note: If a holiday falls on a Saturday, County offices, including 50+ centers are closed this Friday before and if a holiday falls on a Sunday, the County will observe the holiday the following day, Monday

Department of Housing and Community Development's Resource Center 

  • 16 - Day Resource Center at Leola Dorsey
    • Address: 10390 Guilford Road Jessup, MD 20794
    • Hours of Operation:
      • Monday and Wednesday 2:00 to 6:00 p.m.
      • Saturday: 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m.
